title: Flea Treatment in Larchmont, Westchester | $350 - $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Larchmont, Westchester. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Larchmont home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Larchmont and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your property is flea-free and safe for your family and pets.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Larchmont and the surrounding Westchester communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced flea treatment technology. We understand the unique pest challenges facing Larchmont residents, from historic homes near Manor Park to modern apartments along Boston Post Road, and deliver customized solutions that work.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets, proximity to Long Island Sound, and mix of vintage homes and newer developments create ideal conditions for flea populations, especially in properties with pets or wildlife visitors. Our technicians are familiar with Larchmont's neighborhoods, from the Manor Park area to properties near Flint Park, and provide discreet, effective flea control that protects your home's comfort and value.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Larchmont range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. However, because fleas have multiple life stages, complete elimination typically requires 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to break the reproductive cycle and ensure all eggs, larvae, and adults are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours while products dry, after which the space is completely safe. We'll provide specific instructions tailored to your household during service.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: We recommend vacuuming thoroughly before treatment, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during application. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment to ensure maximum treatment effectiveness in your Larchmont home.
